failure_movement.justification: Unknown/retrieval-miss cluster: predicted shrink 6-12, actual -8 — spot-on range. Empty: predicted flat/+1, actual +1 — correct. Wrong: predicted 'drop slightly', actual +1 (rose) — wrong direction. Correct count +6 aligns with the 6-12 fix estimate. Loses points only for the wrong-cluster directional error.

trace_movement.justification: Retrieved count: predicted ~20-25 per task, actual ~49.5 — badly missed magnitude (2x off). Recall passages increased massively (810→3529), directionally right. Archival share: predicted 'larger share', actual fraction fell (33%→25%) — wrong. Prompt tokens rose modestly (+13%) — correct; completion dropped (−11%) — unpredicted.

side_effects.justification: Predicted 1-2 regressions from noisy keyword boosts; actual 3 — slight under-call but correct direction. Empty staying below 4 correctly predicted (3 actual). Overall low regression risk broadly right. Partial credit: regression count slightly under-estimated, no other missed major side-effects.
